title: VeloraOS 1.10.24 - Web Intelligence
releaseNotes: Adds Web Intelligence to Automatic, Tiny, Quick and Deep Thoughts through the shared https://web-api.veloraos.co.uk search service.
Adds per-chat Web Auto, Web On and Web Off controls.
Securely retrieves public web results with protections against localhost/private-network access, unsafe redirects, credential URLs and non-standard ports.
Shows live web-research progress without rebuilding the Chat viewport.
Stores and displays numbered web sources so model citations such as [1] and [2] map to visible source cards.
Only the latest search query is sent to the shared service; chat history and Ollama inference remain local.
Falls back to local model knowledge if Web Intelligence is unavailable.
